case_title: BROWN, SARA ALISON JOHNSON VS. JOHN CAMPBELL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, SARA ALISON JOHNSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JOHN CAMPBELL'S IRISH BAKERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, SARA ALISON JOHNSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA JOHN CAMPBELL'S IRISH BAKERY $16,732.73 PRINCIPAL, $180.54 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,288.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
